pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property in the Maven POM to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/web/Gl.general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
